title: EVA TypeScript Type
description: A TypeScript interface or type alias in the EVA codebase

defined_in_service.description: Service id where this type is defined

repo_path.description: Relative path from eva-foundation root to the type definition file

consumed_by_services.description: Service ids that import/use this type

fields.description: Key field names of this type (documentation only)

used_by_screens.description: Screen ids that use this type directly

used_by_hooks.description: Hook ids that return or consume this type

endpoint_response.description: Endpoint id whose response body maps to this type
